name: Plum Good Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:15
1. Cut each plum into 8 wedges; discard pits.
2. Sprinkle flour evenly in bottom of partially baked pastry shell.
3. Arrange plum wedges side by side in pastry shell, overlapping slightly.
4. Combine cinnamon and sugar; sprinkle over plums.
5. Pour eggs over top, covering surface evenly.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 30 minutes or until top is lightly browned.
Yield: one 10-inch pie.
